title: Prof. Dr. Barış Çoban Served as an Invited Speaker at the 2nd ICEEDT Conference in Japan
content:
Student

News

Details

Date: 20 February 2026

Prof. Dr. Barış Çoban Served as an Invited Speaker at the 2nd ICEEDT Conference in Japan

As part of the conference program, he also co-presented- together with Prof. Dr. Charlène Clonts- the paper entitled “Alternative Journalism in the Digital Age: Safety and Well-being as the Cornerstone of Resilient Journalism Practice.” The presentation examined how the themes of safety and well-being constitute a foundational basis for resilient journalism practices within alternative journalism in the digital age.
